剧情也花了功夫，每个事件都花心思重新设计，不是千篇一律的模板套皮。
最后主角性格很对胃口，财迷又带点搞笑，不会硬整高大上的目标或者到处树敌惹事。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739780760,"group_id":"7459976828489321534","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxw+aT7jL3hX+WckSuWbEZU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ddef882e1c834eaaa5cec964d7ba853a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788815&x-signature=Nst%2FEtHzMoCM0v4R%2Bc02ixUDtos%3D","user_id":"103415795797","user_name":"开泥头车冲业绩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103415795797","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775700787,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459976828489321534","book_info":{"abstract":"（诡异中式克系+绝对神明+异能强者+诡异搞笑）
恐怖神明和诡异肆虐人间，不幸误入城市诡异事件的楚何，成为被神明指定的人皇，从此被残酷恶意的神明当做棋子，作为边缘人游走于三界之间。
但他却要在这个残酷吊诡的世界里，当个不走寻常路的日子人。
本文无cp，中式克系，轻搞笑，颠覆套路，反差流。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/79fc0c974bc664eee8141d8d30dacb31~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"lililicat","author_id":"","book_id":"7459976828489321534","book_name":"在诡异怪谈当边缘人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#405068","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8604人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460025167188607550","read_count":"8604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1421910"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"582","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,无女主,克苏鲁,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of30e81e7bbf8f77528252964f6dbb33c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394597&x-signature=tbaFt7iIW9FhiVCBNp4OGz7XJ1w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3795966829270820","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"189"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230416371287650899DD695A11FE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18752,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":37269,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6170},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7513652660397032254","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大约180章还很好看，爽点十足，尤其是祭舞和桀帝小团队的故事真的特别感人。但是后面有点无聊了。配角太多了，没有主角团，东一榔头西一棒子的，前面挺喜欢的重要配角后面几乎没再出场了，也没有特别感人或者讨人喜欢的人物了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749425768,"group_id":"7459976828489321534","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108841058414"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459976828489321534","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"492"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":39809,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":90438,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7510640991849104190","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看！我是猫老师的十年老粉了，猫老师这一本真的在原有风格的基础上进步特别大！就是主角不是坐轮椅的有点不习惯，不知道后期会不会补上😂😂唯一缺点是反复cue十日终焉，过于舔了。知道你是十日终焉的粉丝，但是不喜欢十日的人看了很烦。","text_exts":[{"e":84,"s":80,"text":"十日终焉","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210597695A11FE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227510640991849104190%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227459976828489321534%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_ g_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6341,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17145,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":7640},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1748727839,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7568652285973234456","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到快一半了[送心]好看好看，只能说此文绝对是嬷嬷必吃文，主角太好嬷了[舔屏]再加上作者写的很多场景和情节描写真的华丽又诡谲，特别好看[舔屏]主角真的就是纯魅魔"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762219625,"group_id":"7459976828489321534","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2872404426107992"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459976828489321534","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"220"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":37777,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7568374994227249944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到四十几章没忍住来评论了，太好看了[送心][送心]作者大大水平真的很高，一开始看就感觉不像番茄本地文，一看段评果然是老作者了
很喜欢这一口中二味，主角萌得要死……很喜欢这种平时衰衰但又时不时发个疯的味，又萌又帅[送心]太喜欢啦，不仅主角塑造的很不错，剧情也很爽（对我来说很爽）幕墙批狂喜，但是主角又时不时倒霉一下惨一下，我的嬷嬷属性又大爆发[舔屏][舔屏]
作者大大写文文笔也很不错，各种画面感都很足，前面一开始的剧情我一边吃饭一边看，因为画面感很足导致差点吃不下去。后面各种剧情场合写的也是很帅很诡异很美，各种风味十足[送心]太喜欢啦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762153940,"group_id":"7459976828489321534","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8UztKy5EypkCh8KNAandmbZUxMU2F3oIpZu+EGC2EoP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6ae8b10b0b54c31bdba3aaa87747ce2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792402&x-signature=WGcbA99EZTk1SVOYYmuS%2BG6gmYQ%3D","user_id":"2872404426107992","user_name":"王弹簧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2872404426107992","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741104265,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459976828489321534","book_info":{"abstract":"（诡异中式克系+绝对神明+异能强者+诡异搞笑）
